from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional

def add_item(items: Optional[List[str]], item: str) -> List[str]:
    if items is None:
        items = []
    items.append(item)
    return items

def update_config(config: Optional[dict], key: str, value: Any) -> dict:
    if config is None:
        config = {}
    config[key] = value
    return config

def register_user(users: Optional[dict], user_id: str, name: str) -> dict:
    if users is None:
        users = {}
    users[user_id] = {"name": name, "active": True}
    return users

def process_batch(batch: Optional[list], new_items: list) -> list:
    if batch is None:
        batch = []
    batch.extend(new_items)
    return batch

def merge_settings(base: Optional[dict], overrides: dict) -> dict:
    if base is None:
        base = {}
    base.update(overrides)
    return base
